title: Rebind v0.5.39 metadata after release preflight correction
rawUserRequest: 再来尝试发版本；发布前若门禁发现流程性问题，先修正根因，再继续发布，不绕过 Contract/Preflight/PR/合并/ai-close-work-item 流程。
outOfScope: Creating or moving the v0.5.39 tag
Creating or publishing the GitHub Release
Rewriting immutable archived Work Item evidence
Changing release workflow logic or archive sequence allocation

sources.reason: Defines the fail-closed release identity, freeze, and archive evidence checks.
The only supported writer for source-bound release freeze metadata.
Defines post-close default-branch synchronization before release evidence generation.
Current stale v0.5.39 freeze evidence identified by release preflight.
Current v0.5.39 candidate archive digest projection.

riskAssessment.reason: Initial skeleton; replace with task-specific implementation and review risks.

agentCapability.blockedReason: No blocker; proceed only through the declared preflight and lifecycle checks.

executionDecision.reason: The user explicitly authorized another release attempt; this Work Item only rebinds stale candidate metadata and does not publish.

preReviewWarnings: Verify all source identity, source tree, archive digest, lifecycle, and release projection fields are generated by the supported finalizer and remain fail-closed.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The v0.5.39 release metadata projections are regenerated from the latest canonical main identity without creating a tag or GitHub Release.
release-freeze.json records the supported lifecycle and exact source-bound tree/archive digests.
release.json and release-digests.json agree with the regenerated candidate archive and source identity.
Release preflight, release-state consistency, and the complete Work Item quality checks pass before PR creation.
guidelines: Use the supported release freeze finalizer; do not hand-edit generated release evidence.
Do not publish or create a tag from this Work Item.
Preserve immutable archived evidence and keep template/adopter boundaries separate.

intent.problem: After the root-process correction merged, release preflight still reports stale v0.5.39 source identity, lifecycle, source-tree, and archive digest evidence. The candidate metadata was generated against an earlier release attempt and no longer describes the current canonical main.
constraints: Do not create a tag or GitHub Release.
Do not modify immutable archived evidence or repair PR #316.
Use the repository finalizer and complete the normal Work Item lifecycle.
Archive growth is warning-only at the configured threshold of 200; structural archive integrity remains fail-closed.
intent.rationale: Rebinding the candidate metadata against the latest canonical main is the minimum functional correction needed to make release preflight evaluate the actual candidate, while retaining all existing safety gates.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized another release attempt; metadata paths are required for this release correction.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
